short_summary: Iran deal signing disputed; Tren de Aragua strike
rationale: The claimed imminent US-Iran deal signing — disputed by Tehran — is the most impactful domestic-foreign policy event; the Tren de Aragua airstrike is a continuation of established policy.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran disputes timing
top_events.summary: A potential Iran deal would directly affect US military posture, oil prices, and domestic political dynamics — but Tehran's denial keeps outcome uncertain and markets cautious.

top_events.title: US kills leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang in air strike
top_events.summary: Continuation of Trump administration's airstrike campaign against criminal organizations; reinforces existing domestic security narrative with limited new policy impact.

top_events.title: Anthropic suspends new AI tools over US government security concerns
top_events.summary: Ongoing federal AI security policy continues to affect the US tech sector; no new qualitative escalation this cycle.
